note: Index only. Trust decisions are always made locally in-tenant against pack signatures.

packs.title: EU AI Act
packs.summary: Operationalizes the EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689): 6 Art. 5 prohibitions + 8 high-risk + 2 transparency obligations (all cited), 6 controls, risk classes, RiskCom routing, revalidation cadence. Signed.

packs.title: NIST AI RMF
packs.summary: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0 — GOVERN / MAP / MEASURE / MANAGE: 10 cited practice obligations + 4 controls + RiskCom routing. Open-source, signed.

packs.title: Labor hours saved
packs.summary: Standard hours-saved value model: hours/period x periods/year x loaded rate -> annualized value, with confidence tiers.
